extract: This article is about the cave in Johto. For the Pokéwalker Route, see Dim Cave (Pokéwalker). Dark cave redirects here. For a list of caves in which Flash is usable, see Darkness → Areas covered in darkness. Dark Cave (Japanese: くらやみのほらあな Dark Cave) is a single-level cave located in eastern Johto. Though it is not necessary to enter the cave to complete the storyline, Dark Cave is the only place in the Generation II games to capture wild Dunsparce and Wobbuffet. As its name implies, Flash is required to illuminate the cave. The cave is unique in that the cave is separated into two parts, yet the cave does not change floors between the two areas.
